title: Support hosted compiled legacy content registration in C-LARA-2
notes: Suggestion #1 from admin export (submitted by mannyrayner on 2026-05-03). Add a mechanism similar to legacy C-LARA where precompiled external or server-hosted content can be registered as C-LARA-2 content via metadata fields (at minimum: content URL, text language, glossing language, publication date). Clarify security and ownership constraints for off-server URLs.
